title: Japan's Sakana AI Releases Fugu Cyber: A Multi-Agent System That Overshadows GPT-5.5-Cyber and Claude
excerpt: The cybersecurity defense line is being redefined by a new operational unit. On July 21, the Japanese AI startup Sakana AI released the Fugu Cyber model, specif
content_html:
The cybersecurity defense line is being redefined by a new operational unit. On July 21, the Japanese AI startup Sakana AI released the Fugu Cyber model, specifically designed to address the complexity of modern network defense. It achieved impressive results in the industry's most challenging security benchmark tests, outperforming leading closed-source competitors.

Specifically, Fugu Cyber achieved an 86.9% success rate in the CyberGym test and a 72.1% success rate in the CTI-REALM test, even outperforming OpenAI's GPT-5.5-Cyber and Anthropic's Claude Mythos-Preview. This means that, when facing real and sophisticated cyber attack and defense scenarios, this startup's specialized model has already surpassed general-purpose flagship models.

content_html_zh:
一个新的作战单位正在重新定义网络安全防线。 7 月 21 日，日本人工智能初创公司 Sakana AI 发布了 Fugu Cyber​​ 模型，专门用于解决现代网络防御的复杂性。 它在业界最具挑战性的安全基准测试中取得了令人印象深刻的结果，超越了领先的闭源竞争对手。

具体来说，Fugu Cyber​​在Cyber​​Gym测试中取得了86.9%的成功率，在CTI-REALM测试中取得了72.1%的成功率，甚至超越了OpenAI的GPT-5.5-Cyber​​和Anthropic的Claude Mythos-Preview。 这意味着，在面对真实复杂的网络攻防场景时，这家初创公司的专用模型已经超越了通用旗舰模型。
